Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 1 [Participants aged 18 years or older (or the minimum age of consent in accordance with local regulations) at screening. Reproductive criteria for male and female participants ]

Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 2 [Histological or cytological diagnosis of A/MBC; >=1% ER+ stained cells on the most recent tumor biopsy and HER2-neg tumor by IHC or ISH per ASCO/CAP. Tumor tissue collection required.]

Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 4 [Participants must have >=1 measurable lesion per RECIST v1.1. Participants with ONLY bone lesions are elegible if >=1 bone lesion has a measurable component per RECIST v1.1.]
Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 5 [ECOG PS ≤ 1.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 10 [Concurrent administration of medications, food, or herb supplements as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 12 [Hepatic dysfunction as defined in protocol]
Subject met exclusion criteria 13 [Hematologic abnormalities as defined in protocol]
Subject met exclusion criteria 14 [Known active infection including HBV, HCV, HIV or AIDS-related illness and SARS-CoV-2 infection as defined in protocol.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 15 [Site staff members involved in the study conduct and their family, site staff supervised by the investigator, sponsor and sponsor delegate involved in the study conduct and their family.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 2 [Known history of drug-induced pneumonitis or other significant symptomatic deterioration of lung functions.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 4 [Refractory nausea/vomiting, chronic GI disease, GI ulcer or bleeding-inability to swallow formulated product, or prior gastric bowel resection precluding adequate absorption of study interventions.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 5 [History of any other tumor malignancies within the past 3 years as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 6 [Impaired cardiovascular function or clinically significant cardiovascular diseases as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 7 [Prior procedures and treatment including major surgery, radiotherapy, other anticancer treatments and participationin other clinical studies as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 8 [Any unresolved toxicities from prior surgeries or therapies, or other toxicities as defined in protocol.]

hallucinated_subcats: Participant met all eligibility criteria but received study treatment prior to assessment of all eligibility criteria
Participant met all eligibility criteria but source documentation is incomplete or missing

missed_subcats: Blind compromised
hallucinated_subcats: ARV-471 was administered without food contrary to protocol instructions
Dispensing error of ARV-471 or abemaciclib
IP accountability not done for ARV-471 or abemaciclib
InvProd was administered without following dosage modification for Hematologic and non hematologic toxicity as defined in the protcol
Storage error/temperature excursion. IP administered to participant without Sponsor approval
Male or pre/perimenopausal participant did not receive required concurrent GnRH or LHRH agonist therapy.
Participant consumed prohibited food or herb supplements that are strong or moderate inhibitors or inducers of CYP3A.
Participant received prohibited subsequent anticancer therapy while still on study treatment.
Participant took a prohibited concomitant medication, such as a strong or moderate CYP3A inhibitor or inducer, during the study.
A female participant of childbearing potential was dosed with ARV-471 and/or abemaciclib without a confirmed negative pregnancy test.
Clinically significant abnormal laboratory results (e.g., indicating hepatic dysfunction or hematologic abnormalities) were not followed up appropriately.
Pharmacokinetic (PK) blood samples for ARV-471, ARV-473, or abemaciclib, or biomarker samples (e.g., ctDNA) were not collected.
Pharmacokinetic (PK) or biomarker samples were not properly collected, stored, or handled, resulting in samples that could not be analyzed.
Protocol-required safety laboratory assessments (e.g., hematology, blood chemistry, coagulation) were not performed.
Protocol-required safety laboratory assessments were performed outside of the protocol-specified visit window.
Safety laboratory results were not reviewed by an Investigator in a timely manner prior to administration of study intervention.
Abemaciclib Lead-In Period visit (Day -7 or Day -1) was conducted outside the protocol-specified window
Combination Treatment Phase 1 cycle visit (Day 1 or Day 15) was conducted outside the protocol-specified 28-day cycle window
Participant visit was conducted outside the protocol-specified visit window
Participant visit was not performed
Phase 2 survival follow-up contact was not performed every 3 months
Screening visit was conducted greater than 28 days prior to the first dose of study intervention
Critical safety laboratory assessments (e.g., hematology, blood chemistry, coagulation) not performed or performed out of window
Patient-reported outcome questionnaires (EORTC-QLQ-C30, EQ-5D-5L) not completed by the participant per protocol schedule
Post-baseline disease assessment (CT/MRI Scans) not done or not completely done per RECIST v1.1
Procedures for contraception counseling or contraception requirements not followed for WOCBP or male participants
Protocol-specified pharmacokinetic (PK) or biomarker blood samples (e.g., ARV-471, abemaciclib, ctDNA) not collected or collected incorrectly
Triplicate 12-lead ECG not performed or performed out of window during the DLT observation period or PK assessments

missed_subcats: Randomized under wrong stratification
hallucinated_subcats: Participant allocated to study intervention out of sequence
Participant allocated to study intervention outside of the protocol-defined screening window (e.g., >28 days prior to first dose)
Participant allocated to the wrong dose level of ARV-471 or abemaciclib
Participant met all eligibility criteria but was allocated to study intervention prior to assessment of all eligibility criteria
Adverse event (AE) or Serious Adverse Event (SAE) was not recorded in the clinical database
Dose-limiting toxicity (DLT) occurring during the Cycle 1 observation period was not reported to the Sponsor within the specified timeframe
SAE reporting was delayed or not reported to IEC or IRB per local regulations
Participant became pregnant during the study but was not discontinued from study treatment
Participant experienced disease progression per RECIST v1.1 but was not discontinued from study treatment
Participant required a prohibited concomitant medication (e.g., strong/moderate CYP3A inhibitors or inducers) but was not discontinued from study treatment
Subject was discontinued but did not meet discontinuation criteria
Participant became pregnant during the study and study intervention (ARV-471 and abemaciclib) was not immediately discontinued.
Participant in Phase 2 did not complete the required patient-reported outcome (PRO) assessments (EORTC-QLQ-C30 and EQ-5D-5L) as specified in the protocol.

Participant or participant's partner failed to comply with the contraception requirements specified in the protocol during the study or for the required duration after the last dose of ARV-471 and abemaciclib.
Participant participated in another clinical study involving investigational drug(s) or vaccine(s) while actively participating in this study.
